New Order SMS Alert

Yardstake routes a locked-in order to Mike. He taps the SMS link — no login required — and reviews the project spec before accepting.

Note from Concierge (Fiona)

Buyer is flexible on delivery date (+/- 2 weeks) but firm on the Quartz counter selection. Site GC has confirmed foundation pour for May 20. Please prioritize this order — buyer has a tenant move-in date.
